hero.subtitle: AI operating system for working with ChatGPT, agents and automation.
hero.valueLine: Master AI prompting for real work
hero.subtext: Learn to run AI like an operating system. Prompt engineering, automation and AI agents for real business results.
hero.codeContextValue: Create a marketing strategy and plan

whatIs.title: What is Prompt Anatomy
whatIs.intro: It's an AI operating system for effective work. The system teaches you to formulate structured prompts so that answers are clear, predictable and verifiable – standardized and repeatable. It's based on the 6-block methodology: META → INPUT → OUTPUT → REASONING → QUALITY → ADVANCED.

methodology.paragraph: Enough of random results. We deploy engineering thinking – in every module: learning → check → practice.

items.title: Breakdown
items.desc: Deconstruct problems into atomic elements that AI interprets without errors.

items.title: Engineering
items.desc: Layered construction using CoT (Chain of Thought) and Few-shot engineering.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: The system integrates into business processes, saving 10–20 hours per week.

ecosystem.title: Vertical Engines
ecosystem.paragraph: Connect to purpose-built work systems ready for your market.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtext: Get access to the Prompt Anatomy training according to the number of modules you choose.
pricing.coreIncludesStarter: Everything in Starter plus Context engineering.
pricing.modulesLocked: Modules 7–15 coming in a later phase.

footer.tagline: We deploy an engineering AI work culture. It's not a course – it's an operating system for your business future.
footer.creator: creator: tomas staniulis
